blockers.description: Phase 8 production gate: ws:sport_event_count > 0 must be confirmed in production before Phase 9 authority is trusted. Phase 9 code is deployed but gate not yet validated.
blockers.workaround: Phase 9 code works regardless — gate confirms ProphetX sends sport_event messages

human_actions_pending.action: Deploy Phase 8+9 changes to production and run alembic migration 008
human_actions_pending.context: status_source and ws_delivered_at columns need migration; WS diagnostic keys need live connection

human_actions_pending.action: Verify Phase 8 HUMAN-UAT: reconnect reconciliation, Redis ws:* keys, ws:sport_event_count > 0
human_actions_pending.context: 3 items in 08-HUMAN-UAT.md requiring live ProphetX WS connection

human_actions_pending.action: Verify Phase 9 HUMAN-UAT: authority window in prod logs, status_source visible in DB

decisions.decision: WS authority window is 10 minutes, configurable via WS_AUTHORITY_WINDOW_SECONDS
decisions.rationale: Matches ROADMAP success criteria; balances freshness vs protection

decisions.decision: status_source column on events table (not separate audit table)
decisions.rationale: Simple, directly queryable, AUTH-01 only needs column visible in DB

decisions.decision: ended status always bypasses authority window
decisions.rationale: Terminal state — prevents ghost events staying artificially live

next_action: Run /gsd:discuss-phase 10 to gather context for WS Health Dashboard phase (frontend phase with UI hint)
context_notes: Phases 8 and 9 complete in one session via auto-advance chain. Phase 10 is a frontend phase (has UI hint in ROADMAP) — will need /gsd:ui-phase before planning. Phase 11 (Tech Debt) is independent and can run anytime.
